questions.question: Describe the main differences between a relational database management system (RDBMS) and a NoSQL database management system. (15 marks)
What is the primary function of the database management system (DBMS) in a relational database management system (RDBMS)? (5 marks)
Explain the concept of normalization in a relational database management system (RDBMS) and its importance in maintaining data integrity. (15 marks)
